name: Golf Country Inc
about: Golf Country Inc is a family-owned and operated retail golf facility in Kimball, Michigan. It operates as a comprehensive destination for golfers, offering both a full pro shop with clubs, apparel, and equipment, and indoor Trackman 4 simulator rentals. The simulator sessions provide an immersive experience with accurate ball and club data analysis on world-class virtual courses. Pricing is structured at $45 per hour for up to four people, making it suitable for both individual practice and group play. The facility is known for its high-quality practice areas and expert custom fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 technology with precise ball and club tracking
High-quality, all-weather practice facilities with fans and heaters
Expert-led custom club fitting with detailed data analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen or food service mentioned.
No bar or alcohol service mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar launch monitor for accurate ball and club data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs for simulator sessions. The venue also offers extensive club rental options and custom fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not offer on-site food or drink service, but you are welcome to bring your own, with the exception of alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on the simulator averages between 45 minutes to an hour per person, depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-owned and welcomes juniors. It offers a welcoming environment suitable for families and young golfers, including lessons and fittings.
